Conference June 25 - 27, 2001 Arlington, VA, USA pp. 4984-4985 Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT In this embedded tutorial, we present Ptolemy II as a modeling and simulation environment for distributed hybrid systems. In Ptolemy II,

nt for distributed hybrid systems. In Ptolemy II, a distributed hybrid system is specified as a hierarchy of models: an event-based top level and distributed islands of hybrid systems. Each hybrid system is in turn a hierarchy of continuous-time mode
tem is in turn a hierarchy of continuous-time models and finite state machines. Contact Update Help Update Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
